# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Rewrite heuristic (added/changed a transform)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`npm test` passes)
- [ ] Rewrites stay safe: never longer than the original; code/URLs/numbers preserved
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added to `core`, `cli`, or the extensions
- [ ] If I touched `packages/core/src`, I ran `npm run sync-core` (so `npm run check-core` passes)
